description_long: This is a tall, ornate stone obelisk monument with a pointed, Gothic-style tip and intricate architectural detailing. The front face features two black plaques with gold inscriptions, flanked by two decorative black lanterns mounted on either side. The base is robust and rectangular, with a slightly projecting plinth and a small flower bed at the front, bordered by low stonework. The rear and sides are plain, with the back face unadorned except for some climbing vegetation. The obelisk is set on a patch of grass, surrounded by a well-maintained garden with flowers and shrubs. The overall appearance is solemn and commemorative, suitable for a park, cemetery, or urban memorial site.
description: A tall, Gothic-style stone obelisk monument with ornate detailing, black plaques, and decorative lanterns, set on a landscaped grassy base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the obelisk's thickness, one lantern, and the edge of the flower bed.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the inscribed plaques, both lanterns, floral wreath, and the full flower bed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a clear look at the lantern and side profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain stone surface with some climbing plants at the base.
attribute_inscription: Two black plaques with gold text on the front face, written in English, with names and commemorative details. The inscriptions are legible and in a formal serif font.
attribute_ornamentation: Gothic-style pointed tip with decorative finials, ornate cornices, and two black lanterns with metalwork on the front. Floral wreath and flower bed at the base add to the ornamentation.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular and robust, made of stone, with a projecting plinth and bordered by a low stone edge. The front features a flower bed with a floral wreath and small plants.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed with Gothic finials and decorative stonework, featuring a series of small triangular projections along the upper edge.
attribute_surrounding_features: Surrounded by a grassy patch, flower beds, and ornamental shrubs. Two black lanterns are mounted at the front, and there is a floral wreath at the base.
